transcript: Speaker A: ओ, तू मराठी आहेस? [Oh, are you Marathi?] Speaker B: हो. [Yes.] Speaker A: तू पुण्यावरून बोलतोस म्हणून विचारलं. [I asked because you are speaking from Pune.] Speaker B: बरोबर. मग इथे किती दिवसांपासून आहेस? [Correct. So how many days have you been here?] Speaker A: आज तिसरा दिवस आहे. [Today is the third day.] Speaker B: पण तरी चांगलं बोलतेस इंग्लिश. [But still you speak English well.] Speaker A: कारण इथे रोज बोलायची सवय लागते, मज्जा पण येते. [Because here you get into the habit of speaking daily, and it's fun too.] Speaker B: हो, इंग्लिश क्लासेस पेक्षा जास्त युजफुल वाटतंय. [Yes, it feels more useful than English classes.] Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Rani, Akash. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad features a simulated call between two Marathi speakers practicing English on the MySivi app, highlighting its ease of use and daily habit-building. It showcases over 10 million downloads as social proof. The call to action promotes a premium trial for just 1 rupee.
